flavor_text.en: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads. This Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face. Ce Pokémon est maintenant Confus.

text.en: Heal 20 damage from each of your Grass Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 20 dégâts à chacun de vos Pokémon Grass.

flavor_text.en: The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect. It withers if a Trainer does not take good care of it.

rules_text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts à 1 de vos Pokémon.
rules_text.en: Heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.
rules_text.es: Cura 30 puntos de daño a 1 de tus Pokémon.
rules_text.it: Cura uno dei tuoi Pokémon da 30 danni.
rules_text.pt-BR: Cura 30 de danos de 1 Pokémon seu.

rules_text.fr: Défaussez votre main et piochez 7 cartes.
rules_text.en: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.
rules_text.es: Descarta las cartas de tu mano y roba 7 cartas.
rules_text.it: Scarta la tua mano e pesca sette carte.
rules_text.pt-BR: Descarte sua mão e compre 7 cards.
rules_text.de: Lege deine Handkarten auf deinen Ablagestapel und ziehe 7 neue Karten.

rules_text.fr: Prenez un Pokémon de base dans votre pile de défausse et placez-le sur votre Banc.
rules_text.en: Put a Basic Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench.
rules_text.es: Pon un Pokémon Básico de tu pila de descartes en tu Banca.
rules_text.it: Prendi un Pokémon Base dalla tua pila degli scarti e mettilo in panchina.
rules_text.pt-BR: Coloque um Pokémon Básico da sua pilha de descarte em seu Banco.
rules_text.de: Nimm 1 Basis-Pokémon von deinem Ablagestapel und lege es auf deine Bank.

rules_text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, placez l’un de vos Pokémon ainsi que toutes les cartes qui lui sont attachées dans votre main.
rules_text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, put 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it into your hand.
rules_text.es: Lanza una moneda. Si sale cara, pon 1 de tus Pokémon y todas las cartas unidas a él en tu mano.
rules_text.it: Lancia una moneta. Se esce testa, riprendi in mano uno dei tuoi Pokémon e tutte le carte a esso assegnate.
rules_text.pt-BR: Jogue uma moeda. Se sair cara, coloque 1 dos seus Pokémon e todos os cards ligados a ele em sua mão.
rules_text.de: Wirf 1 Münze. Nimm bei „Kopf“ 1 deiner Pokémon und alle daran angelegten Karten zurück auf deine Hand.

rules_text.fr: Échangez votre Pokémon Actif avec l’un de vos Pokémon de Banc.
rules_text.en: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
rules_text.es: Cambia tu Pokémon Activo por 1 de tus Pokémon en Banca.
rules_text.it: Scambia il tuo Pokémon attivo con uno dei tuoi Pokémon in panchina.
rules_text.pt-BR: Troque seu Pokémon Ativo por 1 dos seus Pokémon no Banco.
rules_text.de: Tausche dein Aktives Pokémon gegen 1 Pokémon auf deiner Bank aus.

text.en: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

text.en: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez 4 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face.

flavor_text.en: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.

text.fr: Inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque marqueur de dégâts placé sur ce Pokémon.

Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This is an extremely rare Pikachu card. You're very lucky to have found it!

text.en: Flip 3 coins. If 1 of them is heads, this attack does 10 damage. If 2 of them are heads, this attack does 30 damage. If all of them are heads, this attack does 60 damage.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Si vous obtenez un côté face, cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts. Si vous obtenez 2 côtés face, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts. Si vous obtenez seulement des côtés face, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts.

text.fr: Soignez à ce Pokémon la même quantité de dégâts que vous avez infligée au Pokémon Défenseur.

flavor_text.en: Arid regions are their habitat. They move rhythmically, making a sound similar to maracas.

text.en: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.

text.fr: Inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie Grass attachée à vos Pokémon et à ceux de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck's horns.

flavor_text.en: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.
When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.

flavor_text.en: Darumaka's droppings are hot, so people used to put them in their clothes to keep themselves warm.

flavor_text.en: Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies.

flavor_text.en: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they'll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.
These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food—peat moss.

flavor_text.en: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.
Floating in the open sea is how they live. When they find a wounded Pokémon, they embrace it and bring it to shore.

flavor_text.en: They avoid attacks by sinking into the shadows of thick foliage. They retaliate with masterful whipping techniques.

flavor_text.en: This ill-tempered Pokémon is dangerous because when it's angry, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.

text.fr: Inflige 10 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

flavor_text.en: They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.

text.fr: Soignez à ce Pokémon la même quantité de dégâts que vous avez infligée au Pokémon Défenseur.

flavor_text.en: They employ an electrically charged web to trap their prey. While it is immobilized by shock, they leisurely consume it.

flavor_text.en: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.

text.en: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Endormi.

text.en: If the Defending Pokémon is not Asleep, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur n’est pas Endormi, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.

text.en: Heal 20 damage from each of your Grass Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 20 dégâts à chacun de vos Pokémon Grass.

flavor_text.en: They raise their heads to intimidate opponents but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent.
Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.

text.en: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur essaie d’attaquer pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, ce dernier lance une pièce. Si c’est pile, son attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks.
Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.

text.en: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Empoisonné.

flavor_text.en: Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Résistance.

text.en: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Empoisonné.

flavor_text.en: Highly aggressive, it uses the claws near its neck to dig into its opponent and poison them.

text.en: Search your deck for Solosis and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.
text.fr: Cherchez Nucléos dans votre deck et placez-le sur votre Banc. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

flavor_text.en: Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they can survive in any environment.

text.en: Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon and heal all damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez une Énergie attachée à ce Pokémon et soignez tous les dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: When their brains, now divided in two, are thinking the same thought, these Pokémon exhibit their maximum power.

text.en: Does 10 more damage for each Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.
text.fr: Inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Défenseur.

flavor_text.en: These remarkably intelligent Pokémon fight by controlling arms that can grip with rock-crushing power.
It fights by swinging a piece of timber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.
These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.

text.en: Move as many Grass Energy attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.
text.fr: Déplacez autant d’Énergies Grass attachées à vos Pokémon que vous voulez vers vos autres Pokémon, de la manière que vous voulez.

flavor_text.en: They raise their heads to intimidate opponents but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent.

text.en: During your next turn, each of this Pokémon's attacks does 20 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
text.fr: Lors de votre prochain tour, chaque attaque de ce Pokémon inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).

flavor_text.en: They strengthen their bodies by carrying steel beams. They show off their big muscles to their friends.

text.en: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Votre adversaire échange le Pokémon Défenseur avec l’un de ses Pokémon de Banc.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Résistance.

flavor_text.en: When they encounter foes bigger than themselves, they try to throw them. They always travel in packs of five.
The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.

text.en: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite durant le prochain tour de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: It moves along below the sand's surface, except for its nose and eyes. A dark membrane shields its eyes from the sun.

text.en: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.
text.fr: Choisissez 1 des attaques du Pokémon Défenseur. Le Pokémon Défenseur ne pourra pas l'utiliser lors du prochain tour de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: The special membrane covering its eyes can sense the heat of objects, so it can see its surroundings even in darkness.

text.en: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.
text.fr: Choisissez 1 des attaques du Pokémon Défenseur. Le Pokémon Défenseur ne pourra pas l'utiliser lors du prochain tour de votre adversaire.

text.en: If the Defending Pokémon already has any damage counters on it, this attack does 40 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur a déjà des marqueurs de dégâts, cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It can expand the focus of its eyes, enabling it to see objects in the far distance as if it were using binoculars.
Its cute act is a ruse. When victims let down their guard, they find their items taken. It attacks with sharp claws.

text.en: Switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Échangez le Pokémon Défenseur avec 1 des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire.

text.en: If this Pokémon has any Darkness Energy attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage.
text.fr: Si de l'Énergie Darkness est attachée à ce Pokémon, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Stealthily, it sneaks up on its target, striking from behind before its victim has a chance to react.
Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.

text.en: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is also Paralyzed.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Brûlé. Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, le Pokémon Défenseur est aussi Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.
It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

text.en: Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
text.fr: Cherchez une carte dans votre deck et ajoutez-la à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.

text.en: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack.
text.fr: Choisissez 1 des attaques du Pokémon Défenseur et utilisez-la à la place de cette attaque.

flavor_text.en: Each has the ability to fool a large group of people simultaneously. They protect their lair with illusory scenery.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: Its wings are too tiny to allow it to fly. As the time approaches for it to evolve, it discards the bones it was wearing.

text.fr: Inflige 50 dégâts à 1 des Pokémon de votre adversaire ayant au moins 1 marqueur de dégâts. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

text.fr: Si le Pokémon Défenseur est un Pokémon de Niveau 2, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Paralysé.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face.

flavor_text.en: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 80 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face.

flavor_text.en: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the charged energy through its spikes into an area.
Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watches for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: Extremely cautious, they take shifts to maintain a constant watch of their nest. They feel insecure without a lookout.

text.en: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Confus.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: They make the patterns on their bodies shine in order to threaten predators. Keen eyesight lets them see in the dark.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 40 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face.

flavor_text.en: It attacks enemies with strikes of its thorn-covered tail. This Pokémon is wild tempered.

text.en: Put an Item card from your discard pile into your hand.
text.fr: Prenez une carte Objet dans votre pile de défausse et ajoutez-la à votre main.

flavor_text.en: It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.

text.en: Draw a card.
text.fr: Piochez une carte.

flavor_text.en: The long hair around its face provides an amazing radar that lets it sense subtle changes in its surroundings.

text.en: Draw 3 cards.
text.fr: Piochez 3 cartes.

flavor_text.en: It loyally follows its Trainer's orders. For ages, they have helped Trainers raise Pokémon.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a card from your discard pile into your hand.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Pour chaque côté face, prenez une carte dans votre pile de défausse et ajoutez-la à votre main.

text.en: This Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon ne peut pas attaquer pendant votre prochain tour.

flavor_text.en: This extremely wise Pokémon excels at rescuing people stranded at sea or in the mountains.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Each follows its Trainer's orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It can return to its Trainer's location regardless of the distance separating them.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien. Si c’est face, évitez tous les effets d’attaques (y compris les dégâts) infligés à ce Pokémon pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females' flying abilities surpass those of the males.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face.

flavor_text.en: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face.

flavor_text.en: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de côtés face.

text.en: Does 20 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Inflige 20 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de vos Pokémon de Banc.

flavor_text.en: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage and heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts supplémentaires et vous soignez 10 dégâts à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 2 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. Their headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.

text.en: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during his or her last turn, this attack does 70 more damage.
text.fr: Si l’un de vos Pokémon a été mis K.O. par les dégâts d'une attaque de votre adversaire lors de son dernier tour, cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est pile, ce Pokémon s’inflige 20 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

rules_text.fr: Prenez 2 cartes Énergie de base dans votre pile de défausse et ajoutez-les à votre main.
rules_text.en: Put 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.
rules_text.es: Pon 2 cartas de Energía Básica de tu pila de descartes en tu mano.
rules_text.it: Prendi due carte Energia base dalla tua pila degli scarti e aggiungile a quelle che hai in mano.
rules_text.pt-BR: Coloque 2 cards de Energia básica da sua pilha de descarte em sua mão.
rules_text.de: Nimm 2 Basis-Energiekarten von deinem Ablagestapel auf deine Hand.

rules_text.fr: Cherchez une carte Énergie de base dans votre deck, montrez-la, puis ajoutez-la à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
rules_text.en: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
rules_text.es: Busca en tu baraja una carta de Energía Básica, enséñala y ponla en tu mano. Baraja las cartas de tu baraja después.
rules_text.it: Cerca nel tuo mazzo una carta Energia base, mostrala e aggiungila a quelle che hai in mano. Poi rimischia le carte del tuo mazzo.
rules_text.pt-BR: Procure um card de Energia básica no seu baralho, revele-o e coloque-o na sua mão. Em seguida, embaralhe seu baralho.
rules_text.de: Durchsuche dein Deck nach 1 Basis-Energiekarte, zeige sie deinem Gegner und nimm sie auf deine Hand. Mische anschließend dein Deck.

rules_text.fr: Déplacez une Énergie de base de l’un de vos Pokémon vers un autre de vos Pokémon.
rules_text.en: Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.
rules_text.es: Mueve una Energía Básica de 1 de tus Pokémon a otro de tus Pokémon.
rules_text.it: Sposta un’Energia base da uno dei tuoi Pokémon a un altro.
rules_text.pt-BR: Mova uma Energia básica de 1 dos seus Pokémon para outro dos seus Pokémon.
rules_text.de: Verschiebe 1 an 1 deiner Pokémon angelegte Basis-Energie auf ein anderes deiner Pokémon.

rules_text.fr: Retirez tous les États Spéciaux de votre Pokémon Actif.
rules_text.en: Remove all Special Conditions from your Active Pokémon.
rules_text.es: Elimina todas las Condiciones Especiales de tu Pokémon Activo.
rules_text.it: Rimuovi tutte le condizioni speciali dal tuo Pokémon attivo.
rules_text.pt-BR: Remova todas as Condições Especiais do seu Pokémon Ativo.
rules_text.de: Alle Speziellen Zustände auf deinem Aktiven Pokémon verlieren ihre Wirkung.

rules_text.fr: Pendant ce tour, les attaques de votre Pokémon infligent 10 dégâts supplémentaires aux Pokémon Actifs (avant application de la Faiblesse et de la Résistance).
rules_text.en: During this turn, your Pokémon’s attacks do 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).
rules_text.es: Durante este turno, los ataques de tus Pokémon hacen 10 puntos de daño más a los Pokémon Activos (antes de aplicar Debilidad y Resistencia).
rules_text.it: Durante questo turno, gli attacchi dei tuoi Pokémon infliggono 10 danni in più al Pokémon attivo, prima di aver applicato debolezza e resistenza.
rules_text.pt-BR: Nesta vez de jogar, os ataques do seu Pokémon causam 10 de danos extras ao Pokémon Ativo (antes de aplicar Fraqueza e Resistência).
rules_text.de: Während dieses Zuges fügen alle Angriffe deines Pokémon den Aktiven Pokémon 10 weitere Schadenspunkte zu (bevor Schwäche und Resistenz verrechnet werden).

rules_text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, cherchez un Pokémon dans votre deck, montrez-le, puis ajoutez-le à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
rules_text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
rules_text.es: Lanza una moneda. Si sale cara, busca en tu baraja un Pokémon, enséñalo y ponlo en tu mano. Baraja las cartas de tu baraja después.
rules_text.it: Lancia una moneta. Se esce testa, cerca nel tuo mazzo un Pokémon, mostralo e aggiungilo alle carte che hai in mano. Poi rimischia le carte del tuo mazzo.
rules_text.pt-BR: Jogue uma moeda. Se sair cara, procure um Pokémon em seu baralho, revele-o e coloque-o na sua mão. Em seguida, embaralhe seu baralho.
rules_text.de: Wirf 1 Münze. Durchsuche bei „Kopf“ dein Deck nach 1 Pokémon, zeige es deinem Gegner und nimm es auf deine Hand. Mische anschließend dein Deck.

rules_text.fr: Regardez les 5 cartes du dessus de votre deck et replacez-les sur le dessus de votre deck dans l’ordre de votre choix.
rules_text.en: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck and put them back on top of your deck in any order.
rules_text.es: Mira las 5 primeras cartas de tu baraja y vuelve a colocarlas en la parte superior de tu baraja en el orden que quieras.
rules_text.it: Guarda le prime cinque carte del tuo mazzo e rimettile in cima al mazzo nell’ordine che preferisci.
rules_text.pt-BR: Olhe os 5 cards de cima do seu baralho e coloque-os de volta em cima do seu baralho em qualquer ordem.
rules_text.de: Schau dir die obersten 5 Karten deines Decks an und lege sie in beliebiger Reihenfolge zurück auf dein Deck.

rules_text.fr: Montrez l’un des Pokémon de votre main et placez-le sur le dessus de votre deck. Dans ce cas, cherchez un Pokémon dans votre deck, montrez-le, puis ajoutez-le à votre main. Mélangez ensuite votre deck.
rules_text.en: Reveal a Pokémon in your hand and put it on top of your deck. If you do, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.
rules_text.es: Enseña un Pokémon de tu mano y ponlo en la parte superior de tu baraja. Si lo haces, busca en tu baraja un Pokémon, enséñalo y ponlo en tu mano. Baraja las cartas de tu baraja después.
rules_text.it: Mostra un Pokémon che hai in mano e mettilo in cima al tuo mazzo. A questo punto cerca nel tuo mazzo un Pokémon, mostra anche questo e aggiungilo alle carte che hai in mano. Poi rimischia le carte del tuo mazzo.
rules_text.pt-BR: Revele um Pokémon em sua mão e coloque-o em cima do seu baralho. Se fizer isso, procure um Pokémon em seu baralho, revele-o e coloque-o na sua mão. Em seguida, embaralhe seu baralho.
rules_text.de: Nimm 1 Pokémon von deiner Hand, zeige es deinem Gegner und lege es auf dein Deck. Wenn du das machst, durchsuche dein Deck nach 1 Pokémon, zeige es deinem Gegner und nimm es auf deine Hand. Mische anschließend dein Deck.
